MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Irving Pfeffer; Clerk: V. Mack; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Jean Claude Lair is present.
Attorney, Henry Shain, Esq., representing the plaintiff is also present.

Defendant Serge Uryson aka Sergi Korjavin aka Sergy Korjavin aka Sergey Kiorjavin is present.
Attorney, Andrew woodruff, Esq., representing the defendant is also present.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The case did not settle. The trial date of SEP-08-2009 remains set.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Off Calendar
